title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is presented as the best open-source AI model for generating 4K images. The video demonstrates its capabilities compared to alternatives like SeedVR2 and shows integration workflows with ComfyUI and other text encoders.
